creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text: Thanks for the tests, and your suggestion and pointer to the FSF gnu.org statement.  Added to Makefile in the commit.  It has passed three testports for me as well, unfortunately my qemu-user-static based ARM64 jail (on amd64 host, all 13.0-RELEASE-p5) bombs out trying to build ports-mgmt/pkg, so no joy cross-building it for now.
